title: Empty tuple `[]` (only the empty array passes)
description: Zero-length tuple — the validator accepts only `[]` (Array.isArray + length === 0). Edge case for the tuple emit; mirrors mion's `children.length === 0` branch.
notes: Only the empty array `[]` passes — any element at all (even `[null]`) fails the exact length-0 check; a plain object `{}` is also rejected.
